_comment: Auto-repair fixture: stage 7 (POC verify layers) failure at attempt 1. Stage 7 overlays the patched files into the POC's evidence tree and runs run-poc.sh verify-all; any layer that STAYS at FAIL after the overlay means the fix didn't close the finding at the source-code layer. emitTrpJFailure is called with stage_label 'TRP8 POC verify' and the count of still-failing layers as the FAILING_CMD hint.
